name: Quick Trick Stir-Fry Chart
recipeIngredient: 1 cup To 2 cups sliced smoked sausage
1 lb Bulk sausage, cooked and drained
1 cup To 2 cups cooked ham, strips/chunks
1 cup To 2 cups cooked chicken/turkey, strips/chunks
1 lb Ground beef, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose vegetables: 2 cups total of any frozen stir fry vegetable combination (thawed) or sliced fresh mushrooms, canned mushrooms drained, shredded/thinly sliced carrot, julienne carrot strips, sliced/chopped carrot, thinly sliced onion, strips/chopped green/red/yellow bell pepper, fresh broccoli florets, fresh cauliflower florets, pea pods.
2. Choose one seasoning sauce: 1-2 tablespoons of any one below (optional): Worcestershire sauce, light/dark Soy sauce, Teriyaki sauce, Chili sauce, Steak sauce, Cooking wine.
3. Choose one herb/flavoring: 1/2 to 1 teaspoon basil leaves, 1/2 teaspoon marjoram leaves, 1/4 teaspoon thyme leaves, 1/8 teaspoon garlic powder, 4-8 drops bottled hot pepper sauce, Chicken/beef flavor instant bouillon, Grated parmesan cheese.
4. In a medium skillet, heat 2 to 3 tablespoons of vegetables, olive or peanut oil.
5. Add meat and vegetables; stir-fry until hot and vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in seasoning sauce (if desired) and herbs.
7. Prepare half of a 1 pound package of any pasta according to package directions; drain.
8. Add pasta to stir-fry mixture; toss to mix.
9. Heat through.
10. Serve immediately. Refrigerate leftovers.
